name: Actionstep Legal Practice Management API
what_it_does: Actionstep legal practice management REST API for matter management, legal billing, client intake, and law firm workflow automation. Enables AI agents to manage matter creation and lifecycle tracking for law firm case management, handle legal billing, time entry, and invoice generation for legal revenue management, access client intake and CRM data for law firm business development automation, retrieve document management and template automation for legal document workflow, manage trust accounting and IOLTA compliance for legal financial management, handle workflow and task automation for law firm operations, access financial reporting and matter profitability analytics for firm performance management, retrieve legal calendar and deadline management for court date compliance, manage staff assignment and workload distribution for firm capacity management, and integrate Actionstep with accounting systems, document management, and legal research platforms.
use_cases: Managing matter workflows from legal operations agents
Processing legal invoices from billing automation agents
Tracking client intake from law firm CRM agents
Managing IOLTA trust accounts from legal finance agents
not_for: Non-legal professional services without matter management
Solo practitioners without practice management needs
Court or government without law firm billing context
best_when: A mid-size law firm, legal aid organization, or corporate legal department using Actionstep wanting AI agents to automate matter management, legal billing, trust accounting, client intake, and deadline tracking.
avoid_when: IOLTA TRUST ACCOUNTING COMPLIANCE: Automated trust account management must comply with state bar IOLTA rules; automated transfers that commingle client funds or fail to maintain proper trust accounting records create state bar disciplinary proceedings and attorney license suspension risk. Unauthorized practice of law — automated legal advice, document generation for clients, or legal strategy recommendations created by AI agents without attorney supervision creates UPL risk; Actionstep workflow automation must remain administrative, not legal advice. Client confidentiality — matter and client data in Actionstep is protected by attorney-client privilege; automated data sharing or third-party API integration without client consent and confidentiality controls creates privilege waiver risk. Legal deadline automation — automated deadline calculation from court rules must account for jurisdiction-specific rules, holiday schedules, and local rules; automated deadline with calculation error creates malpractice exposure.

auth.notes: Actionstep uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Auckland, New Zealand HQ (North American operations in Denver, Colorado). Founded 2003. Private (Accel-KKR PE). Legal practice management for small to mid-size law firms. 2,000+ law firm customers. Strong in US, Canada, Australia, New Zealand. Competes with Clio, MyCase, and PracticePanther for legal practice management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user monthly subscription; matter and billing modules
pricing.notes: Auckland, New Zealand / Denver, Colorado. Accel-KKR PE. Founded 2003. 2,000+ law firm customers. US/Canada/ANZ focus. Competes with Clio.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: IOLTA TRUST ACCOUNTING RULES: Automated trust account management must comply with state-specific IOLTA rules (three-way reconciliation, proper ledger maintenance); automated trust transfers that commingle funds or miss reconciliation create state bar disciplinary risk and potential attorney license suspension

UPL automated legal advice risk — Actionstep workflow automation must remain administrative; automated client communications that provide legal advice or strategy without attorney review constitute unauthorized practice of law

Legal deadline jurisdiction complexity — automated court deadline calculation must apply correct jurisdiction rules including local rules, standing orders, and holiday schedules; automated deadline calculation error creates malpractice liability

Attorney-client privilege in integrations — automated third-party API integrations must not expose privileged matter data without client consent; privilege waiver through inadvertent disclosure is difficult to cure
OAuth token scope per attorney — Actionstep OAuth tokens are scoped per user; automated multi-attorney matter access requires proper token management per timekeeper
Billing rate automation — automated time entry and billing at incorrect rate creates invoice disputes; verify matter-specific billing rates before automated time entry
agent_readiness.security_notes: Legal practice management. SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. US/AU/NZ. Matter, billing, and client data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Legal practice. SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. US/AU/NZ. Matter and client privilege data.
